hook: Washing off perfectly good makeup at noon because of *that* eyeliner? We've all been there.
post_copy: When I started my journey, the biggest frustration wasn't formulation—it was the moment my carefully applied liner betrayed me. Conferences, big meetings, even just a busy afternoon... the raccoon eyes were real. 😩 It wasn't just about makeup; it was about feeling polished, feeling ready. That feeling of defeat when your confidence literally melts away? It’s draining. That's why our focus became relentless. We weren't just making eyeliner; we were crafting a promise: to stay put, no matter what. So you can focus on *your* day, not your reflection. ✨
visual_direction: A subtle, almost electric blue (`#4f8ef7`) luminescence highlights the pristine eyeliner line, creating a striking contrast against the dark background and the tear.
image_description: Close-up of a model's eye, perfectly lined with waterproof eyeliner. A single tear gently trails from the inner corner, but the eyeliner remains pristine, starkly contrasting against the tear. The studio lighting is dramatic, casting deep shadows with a soft, focused spotlight on the eye. The overall mood is sophisticated and resilient.
